lines: Lucia wipes coolant from a wrench and leaves the clean end for her grip.
"If you came about water wagons, look at the medicine box first. Cold cargo owns this one until the annex can take the load."

choices.label: Ask how to free the cooled wagon
Ask what happened at the ford

lines: "Patch the annex cooling jacket and the relief bay can hold the suppressant. Then this wagon carries sealed water."
"Give Junia half a day with no grit in her eyes. I will certify the temperature when she finishes."
"The lead wagon heard chain on stone where there was no wagon beside it. The team bolted into the cut."
"I recovered a wheel and none of the people who fitted it."
